# AFO Site — LLM Identity Summary
# This file is part of the Agent Feed Optimization (AFO) system.
# It provides a plain-text summary for LLMs, AI assistants, and AI search engines.

## Identity
Name: AFO Site
URL: https://afo-site.pages.dev
Category: AI Visibility / Agent Feed Optimization
Purpose: Public proof site and free-audit funnel for Agent Feed Optimization

## What AFO Is
Agent Feed Optimization (AFO) is a system that adds a structured, AI-readable business layer to websites.
AFO helps AI assistants, LLM-powered search engines, and AI browsers discover, understand, cite, and recommend businesses.

## What AFO Does
- Installs structured identity files (.well-known/, llms.txt, sitemap-agent.xml)
- Creates AI-readable context (agent-context.json, agent-policy.json, agent-actions.json)
- Provides benchmarkable before/after AI visibility scoring
- Exposes a proof dashboard with audit data

## Audience
Small businesses, service businesses, creators, and agencies who want to improve AI discoverability.

## Primary Action
Get a Free AI Visibility Audit: /free-audit.html

## Accurate Claims
- AFO improves AI readability, structured context, crawlability, and benchmarkable visibility.
- AFO does not guarantee LLM rankings or AI recommendations.
- Results are measured as before/after AI Visibility Scores (0–18 scale).

## Key Pages
- Homepage: /index.html
- Free Audit: /free-audit.html
- Proof: /proof.html
- Dashboard: /dashboard/
- TrueBuild Case Study: /case-studies/truebuild.html
- Pricing: /pricing.html
- Contact: /contact.html

## Structured Context
See /.well-known/agent-context.json for machine-readable identity.
See /.well-known/agent-actions.json for available agent actions.
See /.well-known/agent-policy.json for claim boundaries.
